news.headline: Crossject prices reserved capital increase at EUR 7.2M, issuing 3,635,756 shares at EUR 1.6012 each + 3,635,756 warrants.
news.summary: In Dijon, France, on December 11, 2024, at 8 a.m. (CET), Crossject, a specialty pharma company utilizing the ZENEO® auto-injector for emergency medicines, has successfully priced a reserved capital increase of EUR 7.2 million. This was achieved through issuing 3,635,756 New Shares valued at EUR 0.10 each, making up 8.8% of the current share capital. The subscription price per share was EUR 1.6012. Additionally, 3,635,756 Warrants were issued at EUR 0.3788 each. Four Warrants can be exchanged for five ordinary shares at EUR 2.25 per share. The total potential ordinary shares from exercising all Warrants amount to 4,544,695 shares.

news.headline: Jolywood Solar recognized as "Top PV Brand Germany 2024" at Solar Solutions Düsseldorf for innovative modules.
news.summary: On November 27-28, 2024, Jolywood Solar presented its advanced Full-Black Windproof Modules and NIWA modules at the Solar Solutions Düsseldorf event in Shanghai. The high quality of their products drew a large crowd of industry experts to their booth.

news.headline: Russian Foreign Ministry: Attack occurred on Ukraine-controlled territory near Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant.
Russian Foreign Ministry: Ukraine attacked IAEA experts on December 10th.
StanChart aims to capitalize on UAE's growing wealth by hiring more private bankers..
China's Liangzhu ruins gain recognition similar to Aegean Civilization in Greece, on UNESCO list for 5 years.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, as of December 11, 2024, the archaeological ruins of Liangzhu have been featured on the UNESCO World Heritage map for five years. These ruins are being increasingly recognized internationally alongside the Aegean Civilization in Greece, demonstrating the progress made in archaeological research. The site's inclusion on the map highlights its significance and showcases China's rich historical heritage.

news.headline: Yeahmobi joins Amazon Ads Partner Network in China on Dec 11, 2024, boosting its programmatic digital advertising services.
news.summary: In a thrilling update from Xi'an, China on December 11, 2024, it was revealed that Yeahmobi, a programmatic digital advertising platform, has officially become a part of the Amazon Ads Partners Network as an Amazon Advertising Partner. This development signifies a significant milestone for the company as it expands its reach and enhances its capabilities in the advertising domain.

news.headline: Thai banks KPCPY and SCBX pioneer stablecoin remittance, eye Japan link for cross-border transactions for regulatory clarity.
news.summary: Two of Thailand's leading banks, Kasikornbank and SCBX, are venturing into stablecoin-based remittance services to improve cross-border transactions. Kasikornbank has collaborated with Japan's G.U. Group to investigate stablecoin options for remittances between the two countries. This move aims to leverage the significant presence of Japanese businesses in Thailand. The full details can be found on a financial news platform.

news.headline: Terranet partners with mining vehicle manufacturer to enhance BlincVision driver assistance system.
news.summary: Terranet announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with a prominent mining industry vehicle manufacturer. This collaboration aims to enhance and assess the driver assistance system, BlincVision. Through this agreement, both parties will work together to refine the system for improved efficacy and safety.

news.headline: Aegon aims for net-zero GHG emissions by 2030, reinforcing commitment to transition €70B portfolio by 2050.
news.summary: The Hague, December 11, 2024 - Aegon has released new net-zero targets for 2030, building upon existing goals set to apply until the end of 2024, which the company anticipates achieving. This updated set of targets underscores Aegon’s dedication to shifting its general account investment portfolio, valued at approximately EUR 70 billion, to net-zero greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2050. This initiative aims to bolster the worldwide transition towards a net-zero economy.

news.headline: Habib Bank Zurich plc partners with nCino to enhance digital experience for Buy-to-Let Lending business in UK.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina on December 11, 2024, nCino, Inc. revealed that Habib Bank Zurich plc (HBZ UK), a UK subsidiary of Habib Bank AG Zurich Switzerland, has chosen the nCino Platform to advance its Buy-to-Let Lending operations in the United Kingdom. nCino, known for its top banking solutions, made the announcement. HBZ UK, a fully-owned subsidiary, made the strategic decision to harness nCino's intelligent platform for digital growth. This move signifies a significant milestone for both companies involved.

news.headline: Microsoft shareholders rejected adding Bitcoin to reserves due to its volatility. Board opposed due to risks.
news.summary: The board of the company rejected the proposal, stating concerns about the volatility of Bitcoin.

news.headline: Thailand BOI approves 10.5B Baht investment by Foxsemicon's subsidiary for high-precision machinery parts for semiconductor sector
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, the Thailand Board of Investment (BOI) disclosed that it approved investment privileges for a project worth 10.5 billion baht, approximately equivalent to US$306 million. This investment was proposed by UNIQUE Integrated Technology Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Foxsemicon Integrated Technology Inc.

news.headline: Amendment to MUFG Bank's tender offer for WealthNavi Inc. (TSE Code: 7342) initiated on Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: The Tender Offeror, MUFG Bank, Ltd., has started the tender offer for share certificates of WealthNavi Inc. (TSE Code: 7342) on December 2, 2024. An amendment has been made to the "Notice Concerning Commencement of Tender Offer" along with the Public Notice of Commencement of the Tender Offer. This amendment relates to the filing of an Amendment Registration Statement to the Tender Offer Registration Statement by MUFG Bank, Ltd. The specific numbers related to the offer and any potential changes have not been provided in this text.

news.headline: Wilf Blackburn appointed as Non-Executive Chairman for EFGH Board of Advisors. EFGH aims to make finance equitable, offering solutions globally.
news.summary: In Singapore on December 11, 2024, Embed Financial Group Holdings (EFGH.XYZ) announced its mission to promote financial equity for all individuals. The company aims to ensure universal protection in all financial transactions and offer significant financial assistance to those in need. EFGH is currently in the process of implementing these goals, striving to reach a wide audience and make a tangible impact on the financial landscape.

news.headline: Taiko's Liquidity Royale Season 3 offers more rewards for top liquidity providers, aiming to increase TVL and network stability.
news.summary: The Liquidity Royale event by Taiko, known as the TVL Masters Edition, has been extended into Season 3. This season promises higher rewards for the leading liquidity providers participating in the competition. The primary objective of this event is to enhance Total Value Locked (TVL) and ensure the stability of the network. Season 3 of the event seeks to incentivize increased participation and contributions from liquidity providers to bolster the network's overall liquidity and security.

news.headline: Bavarian Nordic plans DKK 150 million share buy-back in Q1 2025, driven by Travel Health business growth.
news.summary: In Denmark's capital, Copenhagen, on December 11, 2024, Bavarian Nordic A/S (OMX: BAVA) revealed plans to initiate a share buy-back initiative totaling DKK 150 million in the early months of 2025. This strategic move comes amidst a notable uptick in the Travel Health sector, bolstered by recent milestones and imminent developments within the company.

news.headline: Faraday Future improves manufacturing efficiency by insourcing FF 91 2.0 EV seats, aiming for operational optimizations.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE) disclosed its decision to bring the manufacturing of FF 91 2.0 vehicle seats in-house. The California-based company is a key player in the global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem. This move is part of their strategy to enhance operational efficiencies by scrutinizing all aspects of their business. Moreover, Faraday Future is actively improving its worldwide supplier network and establishing a more robust foundation.

news.headline: China's top policymakers are considering allowing the yuan to weaken in 2025 as trump tariffs loom - sources.
Workday introduces new AI capabilities for Peakon to enhance employee insights, aid retention, engagement. Dec 11, 2024.
news.summary: Advancements in artificial intelligence (AI) are expected to assist managers in retaining top talent, enhancing employee engagement, and driving organizational success globally. The developments were highlighted at Workday Rising EMEA in Amsterdam on December 11, 2024. Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), a prominent provider of organizational solutions, showcased how AI technologies can support these objectives. This event emphasized the importance of leveraging AI tools to ensure effective talent management and sustainable organizational growth.

news.headline: Restaking can boost blockchain assets with a significant increase in returns - a promising opportunity for investors.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 5.6% this year, marking a significant increase from the previous year's growth rate of 3.5%. The report also highlights that the COVID-19 pandemic has had a lasting impact on the economy, with many countries experiencing a decrease in GDP growth. Furthermore, it is estimated that inflation rates across the world will rise to around 3.8%, signaling potential challenges for consumers and businesses alike. Despite these obstacles, experts remain cautiously optimistic about the economic outlook for the upcoming year.

news.headline: VAALCO Energy secures rig for 2025/2026 drilling campaign in Gabon with Borr Drilling, to drill development and exploration wells.
news.summary: In Houston on December 11, 2024, Vaalco Energy, Inc. disclosed its latest update regarding its drilling program scheduled for 2025/2026 in Gabon. The company has officially partnered with Borr Jack-Up XIV Inc., a branch of Borr Drilling Limited, to carry out drilling activities. The contract encompasses the drilling of various development, appraisal, and exploration wells, alongside workover operations. Additionally, the agreement includes flexibility for drilling extra wells beyond the outlined scope. Vaalco Energy, Inc. is listed on both NYSE with ticket symbol EGY and LSE.

news.headline: Bigbank AS introduces current account service for private customers in Estonia on Dec 10, 2024, aiming to provide convenience and basic functionalities to manage daily finances.
news.summary: Beginning on December 10, 2024, Bigbank will allow their private customers in Estonia to open a current account online. The aim of this service is to improve the convenience of accessing Bigbank's offerings. Initially, the focus will be on assisting current customers, with basic features available for handling daily financial activities.

news.headline: Investment firm Intermediate Capital Group plc reports a major holding, now owning 15% of shares in the company.
INVL Technology to provide investor updates in 2025 with specific calendar schedule.
news.summary: INVL Technology has announced its schedule for releasing information to investors in 2025 with key dates as follows: interim financial statements for the first quarter will be released on April 15, 2025; consolidated quarterly and semi-annual reports will be published on July 15, 2025; financial statements for the third quarter will be released on October 15, 2025; and the audited annual information for the year ending December 31, 2025, will be disclosed on February 28, 2026. Investors can expect timely updates and transparency in line with this released calendar.

news.headline: INVL Baltic Real Estate investor's calendar for 2025 published with key information dissemination dates.
news.summary: INVL Baltic Real Estate intends to provide updates to investors in the year 2025 as per the outlined schedule:

news.headline: Anoto prolongs rights issue subscription period to December 19, 2024.
FTI Consulting hires two senior professionals to enhance capital project expertise in EMEA.
news.summary: The firm has announced new additions to its team, strengthening its capital project expertise in the Europe, Middle East, and Africa region. The new hires bring significant experience and knowledge to the firm, enhancing its capabilities in managing capital projects across EMEA. This move underscores the firm's commitment to expanding its presence in the region and catering to the growing demand for specialized expertise in capital project management. The firm now boasts a team of X experts dedicated to delivering top-notch solutions for clients in EMEA.

news.headline: First Abu Dhabi Bank partners with Broadridge to expand securities finance in UAE and Middle East. Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: In efforts to boost Securities Lending in the UAE and across the Middle East region, First Abu Dhabi Bank (FAB) has partnered with Broadridge, a leading global Fintech company. The initiative, announced on December 11, 2024, aims to expand the securities finance sector in the region. This collaboration is significant as FAB is a major player in the finance industry with a growing presence in the Middle East. By harnessing Broadridge's expertise, FAB seeks to capitalize on the increasing demand for securities lending services. This partnership signifies a strategic move in the finance sector, as both companies work towards catering to the evolving needs of investors and financial institutions in the UAE and the broader Middle East market.

news.headline: Microip (7796) debuted on Taiwan's Emerging Stock Market on Dec. 9, opening at NT$74.5 per share and reaching a high of NT$103, a 72% increase.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Microip (Ticker: 7796) entered Taiwan's Emerging Stock Market with an initial reference price of NT$60 per share. The stock debuted at NT$74.5 and surged to NT$103, marking a substantial rise of around 72%. Concord Securities served as the underwriter for this successful listing.

news.headline: Federal court denies sale of Infowars to The Onion. Bid backed by Sandy Hook families and anti-gun violence group rejected.
news.summary: A bid for the acquisition of a conspiracy website by The Onion has garnered support from families of victims of the Sandy Hook shooting, as well as a nonprofit dedicated to eradicating gun violence.

news.headline: Syrebo partners with Quality Production to expand globally with Hand Rehabilitation Robot. Dec 11, 2024 SHANGHAI.
news.summary: In December 11, 2024, Shanghai-based company Syrebo announced a partnership with Quality Production, a renowned Belgian manufacturer of custom orthopedic aids. As a result of this collaboration, the Syrebo Hand Rehabilitation Robot has now been incorporated into Quality Production's range of products. This agreement marks a significant milestone for both companies, showcasing their commitment to innovation in the field of orthopedic technology.

news.headline: Dogecoin is predicted to reach $8-10 by a top trader, despite a recent 19% downturn. Analyst sees $0.8-1.8 as entry point.
news.summary: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) experienced a significant decline this week amidst the overall drop in the cryptocurrency market, dropping by up to 19% from its 7-day peak of $0.48. This decline was influenced by Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) sudden crash on Monday. Analyst Trader Tardigrade noted that DOGE was moving between oversold and overbought zones on the larger chart, predicting a potential peak in the $8 to $10 range before a descent to the $0.8 to $1.8 support zone as a potential entry point for the next cycle.

news.headline: Circle and Binance partner to boost global USDC& crypto adoption, making USDC available on Binance's platform worldwide.
news.summary: Abu Dhabi, UAE and New York - The cryptocurrency USDC is set to be more accessible on Binance's worldwide platform, reaching a broader audience. This move aims to make USDC available to a larger number of users for trading and transactions.

news.headline: Global Handyman Service Market valued at USD 390.34M in 2023, expected to reach USD 1,579.14M by 2033 with a 16.5% CAGR. Various factors driving growth including urbanization, aging infrastructure, technological integration, sustainability trends, and changing consumer expectations. Regulatory compliance critical. Notable partnership: Edward Andrews Handyman Services innovating with technology. Market scope involves deployment, repairs & maintenance, home improvement type, and regions.
news.summary: The article discusses a new research report by Custom Market Insights on the global Handyman Service Market, showing a growth in market size from USD 390.34 Million in 2023 to USD 448.89 Million in 2024, with a projected value of around USD 1,579.14 Million by 2033 at a CAGR of 16.5%. Factors contributing to this growth include rapid urbanization, aging infrastructure, technological integration, sustainability trends, shifting consumer expectations, and regulatory compliance. The report also highlights the importance of partnerships and acquisitions in the market. Key segments analyzed include deployment, repairs & maintenance, home improvement type, and region. The report provides detailed insights, statistical data, competitive analysis, and a forecast for the period 2024-2033, covering regions such as North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America.

news.headline: Tune in to Bloomberg's Insight with Haslinda Amin on 12/11/2024 for the latest analysis and insights.
Viva Biotech sets up new branch in Boston, USA, expanding global reach in drug research and development.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Viva Biotech Holdings Group disclosed the opening of a new branch in Boston, USA. Being a prominent player in drug research, development, and manufacturing services worldwide, this move signifies a major advancement for the company.

news.headline: BW LPG Limited is distributing USD 0.42 dividend on Oslo Stock Exchange; ex-dividend today. World’s top LPG vessel owner.
news.summary: Singapore-based BW LPG Limited ("BW LPG" or the "Company"), known by OSE ticker code "BWLPG.OL" and NYSE ticker code "BWLP," announced on 2 December 2024 the important details regarding the cash dividend for Q3 2024. The shares will be traded ex-dividend starting today on the Oslo Stock Exchange, and from 12 December 2024 on the New York Stock Exchange. BW LPG is a prominent figure in the industry as the top owner and operator of LPG vessels globally.

news.headline: Bayport Management Ltd refinances senior and subordinated loans, utilizes super senior new money facility.
news.summary: Bayport Management Ltd has successfully refinanced its senior and subordinated loan instruments, along with securing a new super senior new money facility. This move demonstrates the company's commitment to strengthening its financial position and capital structure. The refinancing includes a significant amount of capital, with the new money facility providing further support for future investment opportunities.

news.headline: German Chancellor Scholz plans to call early election soon.
Coincheck's parent company is the first Japanese crypto exchange operator on Nasdaq, following Coinbase's public debut in 2021.
news.summary: Coincheck Group recently made its debut on the Nasdaq, becoming the second regulated crypto exchange operator to go public. This comes after Coinbase's debut in 2021 as the first of its kind. The event highlights the increasing interest in the cryptocurrency market, with Coincheck Group joining the ranks of public companies involved in digital assets. This move further underscores the growing acceptance and integration of cryptocurrencies into the mainstream financial sector.

news.headline: Pastor accused of pushing $6M crypto Ponzi to followers, promising 35% returns. CFTC files charges.
news.summary: A pastor has been accused by the CFTC of endorsing a cryptocurrency scheme to members of his congregation. The scheme claimed to offer guaranteed returns of close to 35%.

news.headline: Santhera's AGAMREE® (vamorolone) approved in China for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy patients aged 4+ by NMPA.
news.summary: In Pratteln, Switzerland on December 11, 2024, Santhera Pharmaceuticals revealed that AGAMREE® (vamorolone) has received approval from China's National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) for utilization in patients in China who are aged 4 years and above. Santhera Pharmaceuticals' stock, listed as SIX: SANN, is associated with this achievement in expanding the reach of AGAMREE® in China, indicating a significant milestone for the pharmaceutical company.

news.headline: BenevolentAI refocuses on original TechBio mission for transformative drug solutions, strategic overhaul announced.
news.summary: In London, BenevolentAI, a leader in merging artificial intelligence with biopharmaceutical advancement, has announced a significant strategic revamp aiming to realign the company with its original TechBio mission. This shift emphasizes a renewed focus on core technologies and innovation in order to enhance the creation of revolutionary drug discovery and development solutions. Concurrently, the company also plans to provide support for this initiative through undisclosed means.

news.headline: Two combination vaccine candidates for influenza and COVID-19 get Fast Track designation in the US.
news.summary: In the United States, two combination vaccine candidates have received Fast Track designation for the prevention of both influenza and COVID-19. This designation allows for expedited review and approval processes for these vaccines. This development is significant in the fight against both viruses, as it could potentially streamline the vaccination process and increase efficiency in immunization efforts. The Fast Track designation indicates that these vaccine candidates have shown promise in clinical trials and their development will be prioritized. This news marks an important step forward in combating the ongoing public health challenges posed by influenza and COVID-19.

news.headline: Red Eléctrica chooses Dassault Systèmes’ 3DEXPERIENCE platform for managing Spain’s electricity network data.
news.summary: In Velizy-Villacoublay, France, Dassault Systèmes revealed that Red Eléctrica, Spain's high voltage electricity system operator, has chosen their 3DEXPERIENCE platform on the cloud after a competitive selection process. This platform will aid in handling technical asset information for Spain's electricity network. Red Eléctrica serves as the TSO for the Spanish electricity system. Dassault Systèmes is listed on Euronext Paris under FR0014003TT8, DSY.PA.

news.headline: Pharming reports successful pediatric trial for leniolisib in APDS, rare immunodeficiency in children aged 4-11 years.
news.summary: A multinational Phase III clinical trial is currently investigating the efficacy of leniolisib tablets in children between the ages of 4 and 11 diagnosed with APDS, a rare primary immunodeficiency disorder. This study involves a significant number of participants internationally and aims to assess the effectiveness of the medication in treating this specific age group affected by the condition. The trial is an essential step in determining the potential benefits and safety of leniolisib for children with APDS, contributing valuable insights to the medical community and potentially offering a new treatment option for this rare primary immunodeficiency disorder affecting young individuals.

news.headline: November 2024 brings notable financial success for Coop Pank AS with impressive results.
Red Eléctrica improves design process and collaboration with Dassault Systèmes’ 3DEXPERIENCE Platform. #DassaultSystèmes #grid
Syrebo showcased innovations at MEDICA 2024 - upper limb, BCI, and home rehab robots introduced.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 11, 2024, Syrebo unveiled a range of cutting-edge rehabilitation robot products at MEDICA 2024 in Düsseldorf on November 11. These included an upper limb rehabilitation robot, a BCI rehabilitation robot, and a newly introduced home rehabilitation robot. These offerings garnered significant interest at the event.
